SoSoValue AMA #2 Snapshot & Distribution dates!! 📸SoSoValue Season 2 Snapshot, SoSoValue Season 3 confirmed, Ruv clarification, Snapshot dates Announced & more Testnet airdrop: - Eligibility checker live on 28th (next tuesday) on the testnet pages - Testnet airdrop distribution on may 8th - Appeal channels will remain open after April 28 SoSoValue S2 Snapshot - 3 seperate, randomly timed snapshot during May - Eligibility Critera based on these snapshots, ruv & overall sosovalue and sodex activites - Final announcement & Distribution end of May Ruv (Real User Verification): - Having below 100% Real Human Verification, but above 0% does not mean you are ineligible Everything is from the community call...

💥 DETAILED UPDATE ON #SOSO SEASON 2 AIRDROP SNAPSHOT: The co-founder stated that starting today till the end of May 2026, the snapshot will be taken randomly in three basis. - Real user probability verification and your overall activity on #SOSOValue and #SoDex will determine your eligibility and allocation. He also clarified that having a verification level below 100% does not mean you are disqualified. Additionally, the Foundation will announce the total airdrop allocation by the end of May 2026, and a portal will be opened for users to check their eligibility status and allocation. He also hinted at a possible Season 3 airdrop.
